root.description:
BehaviorTree.CPP node manifest for walking_zoo. The shared library libwalking_zoo_bt.so registers its nodes via BT_REGISTER_NODES and can be loaded with BT::BehaviorTreeFactory::registerFromPlugin(...), or linked directly and registered with walking_zoo_bt::register_walking_zoo_bt_nodes.
Registered nodes: - CheckWalkingReady (Condition): SUCCESS when the WalkingState on the walking_state input port reports the robot ready to walk. - ClearWalkingFault (Action): SUCCESS when the clear_succeeded input port indicates the clear-fault service call succeeded.
